description: Ultra-minimal, zero decoration, surgical whitespace. Every pixel is justified. The product disappears behind its content.

exemplars.name: Linear
exemplars.signature: Tight type (-0.03em), purple accent, no gradients

exemplars.name: Vercel
exemplars.signature: Black + white only, Geist font, mathematical spacing

exemplars.name: Apple
exemplars.signature: Massive whitespace, cinematic imagery, SF Pro

exemplars.name: Stripe
exemplars.signature: Weight-300 elegance, purple gradient, rich docs

vocabulary.colors: Monochromatic or single accent, zero chromatic noise
vocabulary.typography: Tight tracking (-0.02 to -0.03em) on headings, weight 300-600 only
